scripts.build:core: pnpm --filter @fanxipan/compiler build && pnpm --filter @fanxipan/runtime build && pnpm --filter @fanxipan/router build && pnpm --filter fanxipan build && pnpm --filter vite-plugin-fanxipan build
scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter @examples/basic build && pnpm --filter @examples/todo build && pnpm --filter @examples/router build && pnpm --filter @examples/playground build && pnpm --filter @examples/ssr build && pnpm --filter @examples/full-fanxipan build
scripts.build:fanxikit:phase1: pnpm --filter fanxikit build && pnpm --filter fanxikit-vite build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-node build
scripts.build:fanxikit:phase4: pnpm --filter fanxikit build && pnpm --filter fanxikit-vite build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-node build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-static build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-cloudflare build
scripts.build:fanxikit:phase5: pnpm --filter fanxikit build && pnpm --filter fanxikit-vite build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-node build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-static build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-cloudflare build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-vercel build && pnpm --filter fanxi-adapter-netlify build
scripts.test:fanxipan:js: pnpm --filter @fanxipan/runtime test && pnpm --filter @fanxipan/router test && pnpm --filter @fanxipan/compiler test && pnpm --filter fanxipan test && pnpm --filter vite-plugin-fanxipan test && pnpm --filter create-fanxipan test
scripts.test:fanxipan: pnpm run test:fanxipan:rust && pnpm run test:fanxipan:js
scripts.verify:fanxipan: pnpm run doctor:core && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run test:fanxipan && pnpm run bench:runtime && pnpm run soak:runtime && pnpm run test:e2e:examples
